meaning: International Monetary Fund,国际货币基金组织
examples: The IMF has scaled back its growth forecasts for the next decade.
In a hard-hitting speech to the IMF, he urged Third World countries to undertake sweeping reforms.
Argentina is one of only a handful of countries that refuse all dealings with the International Monetary Fund (IMF).
There is no risk to British taxpayers of seeing the IMF perform its proper role.
When the world is in crisis, it is right to consider boosting the IMF.
